key.name: show-seconds
key.description: Whether to show seconds in the clock

key.name: show-date
key.description: Whether to show date in the clock

key.name: show-calendar
key.description: Whether to show the calendar in the date menu

key.name: show-events
key.description: Whether to show events in the date menu

key.name: show-world-clocks
key.description: Whether to show world clocks in the date menu

key.name: show-weather
key.description: Whether to show weather in the date menu

key.name: workspace-popup
key.description: Whether to show workspace popup when switching

key.name: workspace-indicator
key.description: Show workspace indicator in top bar

key.name: show-app-menu
key.description: Show the app menu in the top bar

key.name: show-activities
key.description: Show the Activities button in the top bar
